title: Tinted Grove
description: Adds 16 coloured wood types to Minecraft, each grown from custom saplings with full building sets including planks, stairs, and more.
body:
Tinted Grove

Bring colour to your forests.

Tinted Grove adds 28 coloured wood types to Minecraft, each grown from custom saplings and fully usable in building. 

Craft coloured saplings using dyes and oak saplings, grow vibrant new trees, and expand your builds with a full palette of natural wood colours.

Features:

28 coloured wood sets
Custom saplings for each colour
Fully functional coloured trees
Complete building sets, including:
Logs & Stripped Logs
Wood & Stripped Wood
Planks
Stairs & Slabs
Fences & Fence Gates
Doors & Trapdoors
Buttons & Pressure Plates
28 Coloured Variants of Each Minecraft Flower (WIP)

Recipes: Coloured saplings are crafted using:

1 Oak Sapling
4 Matching Dye

Custom dyes are crafted using:

1 Tinter (Crafted From 1 White Dye)
1 Minecraft Dye

Custom plants:

1 Flower
4 Dye

Grow the saplings to obtain coloured logs, then craft them into full building sets just like vanilla wood.

Design Philosophy: Tinted Grove is designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft:

Vanilla-style textures
Simple and intuitive crafting
No unnecessary complexity

Compatibility:

Minecraft 1.21.1
NeoForge 21.1.221

Future Plans:

Additional plant types
Potential new tree styles

Notes: Tinted Grove is still in its early days. Feedback is welcome!
